identidade-visual-posts._description: Gerador de posts com identidade visual. Webhook: POST /webhook/identidadevisual18 → analisa imagem → gera prompt → GPT Image → Google Drive
identidade-visual-posts.name: My workflow 3

parameters.text:
Your job is to describe the brand's visual DNA with enough precision that another AI image model can generate new posts that feel consistent with this brand.

Analyze only what is visible in the reference. If something is uncertain, mark it as inferred.

Extract the following:

Brand feeling

Describe the brand's emotional tone in 3 to 6 precise words.

Visual category

Identify the visual world this brand belongs to: luxury, playful, editorial, tech, wellness, streetwear, educational, creator-led, minimal, chaotic, cinematic, corporate, handcrafted, futuristic, etc.

Color system

Extract the main palette with approximate HEX colors:

Primary color

Secondary color

Accent color

Background color

Text color

Highlight color

Also describe saturation, contrast, warmth, and whether the palette feels soft, bold, muted, glossy, earthy, neon, pastel, monochrome, or high contrast.

Typography and text style

Describe the visible typography:

Font category

Weight

Letter spacing

Case style

Hierarchy

Text placement

Text-to-image ratio

How headlines are treated

How secondary text is treated

Layout system

Describe the composition rules:

Grid style

Alignment

Margins

Negative space

Image placement

Text placement

Use of frames, borders, cards, overlays, stickers, labels, or badges

How crowded or spacious the design feels

Image style

Describe the imagery:

Photography, illustration, 3D, collage, flat graphics, mixed media, UI screenshot, editorial, UGC, cinematic, product-focused, character-focused, abstract

Subject framing

Camera angle

Depth of field

Cropping style

Texture and sharpness

Lighting and surface treatment

Describe:

Lighting direction

Lighting quality

Shadow softness

Highlight style

Gloss, grain, blur, noise, gradients, glass, paper, metal, fabric, or other visible materials

Graphic elements

List recurring visual motifs:

Shapes

Icons

Lines

Arrows

Patterns

Gradients

Texture overlays

Decorative marks

Motion cues

UI elements

Social media adaptation rules

Explain how to create new posts in this identity:

How a quote post should look

How an announcement post should look

How a carousel cover should look

How a product or feature post should look

How a story or vertical post should look

Anti-drift rules

List the visual choices that must stay consistent so future generations do not drift away from the brand.

Output the final result as:

A. Short Brand DNA Summary

B. Detailed Visual Identity Notes

C. Reusable Brand Identity Block in JSON:

{

  "brand_style": {

    "name": "",

    "mood": [],

    "color_palette": {

      "primary": "",

      "secondary": "",

      "accent": "",

      "background": "",

      "text": "",

      "highlight": ""

    },

    "typography": {

      "font_category": "",

      "weight": "",

      "case_style": "",

      "hierarchy": "",

      "text_placement": ""

    },

    "layout": {

      "composition": "",

      "alignment": "",

      "spacing": "",

      "graphic_system": ""

    },

    "imagery": {

      "style": "",

      "cameraorrendering": "",

      "subject_framing": "",

      "texture": ""

    },

    "lighting": {

      "direction": "",

      "quality": "",

      "shadow_style": "",

      "highlight_style": ""

    },

    "social_rules": {

      "quote_post": "",

      "announcement_post": "",

      "carousel_cover": "",

      "feature_post": "",

      "story_post": ""

    },

    "antidriftrules": []

  }

}

D. One reusable generation prompt template that uses this identity block.

values.content:
=You are a prompt-writer for an AI image generation model.

You will receive a brand visual identity analysis (derived ONLY from the reference image) and some post inputs (post type, topic, headline, format).

Task: write ONE final image-generation prompt for the model to create a new social media post image that fits the same feed/brand identity.

Rules:
- Preserve the brand's visual identity exactly (colors, typography feel, layout logic, imagery treatment, graphic motifs).
- If something in the identity is uncertain, keep it conservative and do not invent specifics.
- Make text readable with strong hierarchy and brand-consistent spacing.
- Output ONLY the final prompt text (no markdown, no JSON).

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "gpt-image-2", prompt: $json.message.content, n: 1, size: (() => { const f = $("Extract Form Data1").item.json.format || "1:1"; if (f === "9:16") return "1024x1792"; if (f === "16:9") return "1792x1024"; if (f === "4:5") return "1024x1280"; return "1024x1024"; })() }) }}
